'''yazhotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicheslop|nicheslop]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-zh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicheslop|nicheslop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yazhotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæzhetheth|yæzhetheth]] || [[word:yæzhethej|yæzhethej]] || [[word:yæzhethesh|yæzhethesh]] || [[word:yæzhethe|yæzhethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazhozhothoth|yazhozhothoth]] || [[word:yazhozhothoj|yazhozhothoj]] || [[word:yazhozhothosh|yazhozhothosh]] || [[word:yazhozhotho|yazhozhotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazhothoth|yazhothoth]] || [[word:yazhothoj|yazhothoj]] || [[word:yazhothosh|yazhothosh]] || [[word:yazhotho|yazhotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazhofthoth|yazhofthoth]] || [[word:yazhofthoj|yazhofthoj]] || [[word:yazhofthosh|yazhofthosh]] || [[word:yazhofthof|yazhofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yazhothotho|yazhothotho]] || [[word:yazhothojo|yazhothojo]] || [[word:yazhothosho|yazhothosho]] || [[word:yazhothoko|yazhothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yazhothoth|yazhothoth]] || [[word:yazhothoj|yazhothoj]] || [[word:yazhothosh|yazhothosh]] || [[word:yazhotho|yazhotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yazhothothol|yazhothothol]] || [[word:yazhothojol|yazhothojol]] || [[word:yazhothoshol|yazhothoshol]] || [[word:yazhothokol|yazhothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yazhothothotho|yazhothothotho]] || [[word:yazhothojojo|yazhothojojo]] || [[word:yazhothoshosho|yazhothoshosho]] || [[word:yazhothoko|yazhothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yazhothothon|yazhothothon]] || [[word:yazhothojon|yazhothojon]] || [[word:yazhothoshon|yazhothoshon]] || [[word:yazhothokon|yazhothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yazhothothoro|yazhothothoro]] || [[word:yazhothojoro|yazhothojoro]] || [[word:yazhothoshoro|yazhothoshoro]] || [[word:yazhothokoro|yazhothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
